meaning: n.稻,谷,<俚>爱尔兰人,警察,<英口>狂怒,大怒
examples: Paddy was always cheerful and jolly.
The musicians burst into a rousing rendition of "Paddy Casey's Reel."
The ears of paddy are ripe and golden.
The mortar was captured on a patrol in a rice paddy, from Vietcong forces.
"I am delighted to welcome Paddy to the team and to begin working together, " said Brawn.
